crime.value: Brutal murder of Amanda Geralds, aged 24, body jammed into vending machine with coils through her body
crime.quote: The woman was loosely jammed into the vending machine, the coils which previously held confectionary now jammed

victim.value: Amanda Geralds, age 24, university student from small town near bay-side trade area
victim.quote: Amanda Geralds, age 24. Studying at Kieilla University. Lives in a small town called Mori

closed_world.value: The floating islands called 'the whispers' inhabited by native priests called the Kogai
closed_world.quote: the whispers are the famous floating islands of Terra and are inhabited by the native priests called the Kogai

investigator.value: Jackson, a detective/investigator working with partner Charles and consultant Frank
investigator.quote: Jackson slipped the files out from beneath his arm

red_herring.value: Frank's mysterious past and dismissal from the force may be misdirection from the true threat
red_herring.quote: Newer than the fact that your allowed to help us after what you pulled?

clue_fairness.value: Reader sees Amanda's profile and crime scene details alongside Jackson's investigation
clue_fairness.quote: Amanda Geralds, age 24. Studying at Kieilla University. Lives in a small town called Mori

social_world.value: Police hierarchy with tension between Jackson, Charles, and consultant Frank after Frank's dismissal

reveal_mechanic.value: Supernatural element through Kogai priests who can communicate with the dead victim Amanda
reveal_mechanic.quote: the occupants can talk to the dead which are held here by their god

investigator_wound.value: Charles requires containment shield suggesting he's affected by supernatural forces during investigation
investigator_wound.quote: Charles climbed into the containment shield
